title: Canonical Music Registry
description: The single source of truth for every licensed music track available to ANY ORVYQ project's proof or full render. Proof and full render workflows resolve music by track_id against this registry and the local canonical asset it points to -- never by fetching a third-party URL at render time. New tracks are added only by the music intake workflow (.github/workflows/orvyq-music-intake.yml / scripts/orvyq_music_intake.mjs), never hand-edited into this file directly, so every entry's hash/size/duration always reflects a file that was actually verified at intake time.

asset_path.description: Path relative to the repository root of the canonical local asset (a Git LFS-tracked file under music_library/tracks/).

acquisition_provenance.description: Exactly how this file's bytes were obtained and verified -- e.g. which prior CI run's artifact recovered it, or which intake run downloaded and verified it.
